title: Egg Slicer with Stainless Steel Wire Egg Slicer,Multifunctional Egg Cutter,Heavy Duty Egg Cutter with Sharp Wire for Evenly Slicing Boiled Eggs Ham Banana and Strawberry (Green)
features: 【Quality Material】Egg cutter is made of food-grade stainless steel, cutting strips sharp and resistant, cutting eggs fast, not easy to rust, easy to clean, safer to use. The base is made of environmentally friendly ABS material, comfortable to the touch, strong and resistant, not easy to move, easy to use

【Excellent Design】The egg cutter is curved to accommodate different sizes of food, such as eggs, fruits or other soft objects, preventing them from falling off when cutting. You can put the food into the groove and just press the slicer down to cut easily, easy to use

【Easy to Use】The stainless steel wire of the egg slicer is very thin, it is designed to be safer and more practical, the hollow design of the base can hold the egg well, a gentle press can quickly divide the food, the slices are neat and even, not easy to stick. After use, just wash it with water or dishwasher, you can easily remove food residues

【Kitchen Essential】This multifunctional egg slicer is versatile. It can be used to cut hard-boiled eggs, as well as mushrooms, strawberries, kiwis and other soft foods, which can save you a lot of time and add fun to making food, it is a good helper in the kitchen

【Easy to Carry】Our egg slicer is compact and delicate, lightweight, takes up little space, lightweight and resistant, easy to carry and store. It can be hung on the wall or placed horizontally or vertically in a drawer to save space in the kitchen. You can also put it in your bag and use it as you like when you are camping and picnicking
description: Specification: Package Included: 1x boiled egg cutter Material: ABS + Stainless steel Weight: 62g Size: 8*11.5*3.5cm Colour: grey-green Features: 1.Creative kitchen egg slicer, boiled eggs, kiwi, strawberries and other soft fruits can be sliced, versatile and beautifully sliced to whet the appetite. 2.Made of food grade 304 stainless steel, sharp and resistant, cut eggs quickly, easy to clean. 3. Neatly cut and not easy to stick to the egg pieces, slicing evenly, clean and tidy countertop. 4.ABS material base, non-slip bottom is not easy to slide when using, easy to use, solid operation. 5. Convenient and practical, a good helper for kitchen cooking.
